primary_source: Bearden, Energy from the Vacuum: Concepts and Principles (Cheniere Press, 2002), ISBN: 978-0972514620; cert [155] QA_BEARDEN_PHASE_CONJUGATE_CERT.v1.
source_claim: Cert [155] Bearden phase-conjugate formalism applied to text domain via character-entropy observer projection should yield sign-consistent label-entropy negative correlation with pre-registered magnitude threshold; attempt-3 run 2026-04-05.
qa_translation: Map text to QA state via char-entropy + mod-24 observer projection (raw ord%24, window=7, single-stream). Test attempt-3 char-entropy sign consistency against deepset and xtram1 correlations with permutation magnitude null.
failure_mode: Attempt-3 achieved sign-consistent negative correlation (deepset r=-0.087, xtram1 r=-0.076) — label-entropy sign inversion mechanism STRUCTURALLY CONFIRMED. But formal NULL on magnitude per pre-reg threshold. Architectural diagnosis (2026-04-05): text weakness is FRAMEWORK-LIMITED not domain-limited — attempt-3 observer projection used raw ord%24 + window=7 + same-stream global, whereas the finance framework that achieves significant magnitude uses k-means k=6 on 6D standardized features + window=63 + separate global feature stream. generator_insufficient classification: the attempt-3 observer projection does not span the feature class required to surface Bearden-style phase-conjugate coupling at statistical magnitude. [155] not amended; next experiment is finance-style text port.
source_attribution: Will Dale + Claude 2026-04-05; see MEMORY.md project_bearden_injection_domain_pilot and feedback_qa_never_dead_implementation_first
